Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10094 0 0}Dude, I'm a dancing machine! Someday, I'm gonna get the high score![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 0 25 25}Totally changing the subject, but... I need to ask you something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10064 0 0}D-Don't laugh, okay...? But, uh, I wanted to know if, um... if you've ever kissed a girl before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10073 0 0}Y-Yeah, of course, that's what I thought. I just, you know, had to ask.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 1}{f 4 23 0 101 10 25 25}I mean, I don't wanna hang around someone who's never even kissed a girl before. Haha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10074 0 0}{f 5 13 2 30 101}Wait, really? Wow, dude, I totally would've thought you had...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}I mean, it's no big deal or anything. It's not like I've ever kissed a girl before, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 1}Wow, dude... I didn't know you were such a playa...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10047 0 0}...Sorry. That was a weird question, huh? Let's just forget about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}So, where to next? Wanna go check out the CDs?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us hung out for a while longer[n]before I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
